nasb.text: These things you have done and I kept silence; You thought that I was just like you; I will reprove you and state the case in order before your eyes.

esv.text: These things you have done, and I have been silent; you thought that I was one like yourself. But now I rebuke you and lay the charge before you.

cnv.text: 你作了這些事，我默不作聲； 你以為我和你一樣？ 其實我要責備你，要當面指控你。

ccb.text: 我对你的所作所为默然不语， 你就以为我与你是同道。 现在我要责备你， 当面指出你的罪状。

csbs.text: 你做了这些，我还保持沉默； 你就以为我完全像你一样； 其实我要责备你，并且把这些摆列在你眼前。
